title: Time
excerpt: Ordered this Daniel Wellington watch - Dapper in Rose Gold for JC but I may just keep it for myself. Taking some moments to just write down favorite quotes has been a favorite pastime this year. Going to continue doing…
body:
Ordered this Daniel Wellington watch - Dapper in Rose Gold for JC but I may just keep it for myself. Taking some moments to just write down favorite quotes has been a favorite pastime this year. Going to continue doing this for next year but also thinking of another creative habit I can instill for 2016. Let me know your thoughts. I am still loving this waterbrush by Tim Holtz/Ranger..

I find that life is sweeter when you make time for what matters most. That's going to be my top priority for this weekend. How about you?
